reply_text: The book Chaos (which is what the new Netflix documentary covers) is about Tom O'Neal's 20-year investigation into the CIA's possible involvement in the murders. In those days, the CIA violated its charter, which forbids it from operating on domestic soil, for the purpose of infiltrating fringe groups and sowing chaos. This was done to undermine the legitimacy of leftist ideologies that were gaining traction. Some of this came out during the Church Committee, but many of the documents covering these operations had been destroyed. Moreover, witnesses denied that the CIA's experiments in mind control were ever successful. (Other individuals suspected of being involved in such experiments denied even being affiliated with the CIA.) O'Neal's investigation turned up evidence contradicting all of this.
